texto: I'm not sure if you've noticed this yet, but Jenny Sullivan likes to overuse people's first names. It's a technique she read about in a book called Own It - Take Life By The Bollocks. She once said my name so many times I disconnected from it entirely.
explicacao: Citação de Claire Garber sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “I'm not sure if you've noticed this yet, but Jenny Sullivan likes to overuse people's first names…” articula reflexao, chick-lit, fun em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como fun e humour.
